description:
A perfectly lovely end to a perfectly lovely story. Put on a comfortable hospital gown, grab a friend or two, and relax to the sound of crackling fire, burning institutions, willfully lost memories, and the kind of catharsis that is only borne through destruction. 

Study/sleep/crying yourself to sleep ambience!
